name: Cheese Crock Pot Chicken
recipeIngredient: 6 chicken breast, no skin, no bone, R-T-C
garlic powder, salt, pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the chicken and sprinkle with salt, pepper, and garlic powder.
Place in crockpot.
2. Mix undiluted soups and pour over chicken.
Cook on low for all day.
3. About 30 minutes before serving, add sherry,
and stir well. Let cook an additional 30 minutes.
Serve over rice or noodles.
Note: Leftovers freeze well and reheat nicely.
The "sauce" to this dish is incredibly good.
